scripts.sync:gmail: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js sync:gmail
scripts.refresh:events: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js refresh:events
scripts.render:content: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js render:content
scripts.report:upcoming: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js report:upcoming
scripts.run:daily: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/index.js run:daily
